_about: Copy to tracker_preferences.json and edit freely. With enabled=false, the entire file is treated as absent (config-file order wins). category_priority lists category strings in display order; unlisted categories fall to the end. tracker_order gives per-category overrides keyed by category id; within each list the first id sorts first. home_state is a two-letter US code that substitutes into tracker params: any `${home_state_padd}` placeholder resolves to the EIA PADD duoarea for that state (e.g. PA → R1Y). To watch gas prices in a SECOND region as well, add another tracker entry to trackers.json with an explicit duoarea — e.g. {"id": "gas_retail_west", "label": "Retail Gasoline (West Coast)", "category": "energy", "source": "eia", "params": {"duoarea": "R50", "product": "EPMR"}, "cadence": "weekly", "stale_after_hours": 192, "history_days": 365, "enabled": true}.
